revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguЕҸk 3 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:1жңҲ3ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 1мӣ” 3мқј]][[za:Ndwencieng ngoenz cosam]][[zh-classical:жӯЈжңҲеҲқдёү]][[zh-min-nan:1 goeМҚh 3 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:жӯЈжңҲеҲқдёү]][[zh:жӯЈжңҲеҲқдёү]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 3|qq=January 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=дёҖжңҲеҲқдёү|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 1мӣ” 3мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|е…ҲиІ |1=RokuyЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=RokuyЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to е…ӯжӣң|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to е…ӯжӣң|1=RokuyЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|en|Emperor Nintoku|qid=Q313119|lt=Nintoku TennЕҚ|1=Emperor Nintoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|313|en|313|qid=Q30882|lt=313|1=313}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}}) вҖ“ The 16th Emperor of Japan, {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|en|Emperor Nintoku|qid=Q313119|lt=Nintoku TennЕҚ|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, ascended to the throne. * {{ill|Empress KЕҚgyoku|en|Empress KЕҚgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Saimei TennЕҚ|1=Empress KЕҚgyoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|655|en|655|qid=Q30045|lt=655|1=655}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}}) вҖ“ The Empress Gokaku (зҡҮжҘөеӨ©зҡҮ) reassumed the throne, making {{ill|Empress KЕҚgyoku|en|Empress KЕҚgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Saimei TennЕҚ|1=Empress KЕҚgyoku}} the 37th Emperor. * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Tenji TennЕҚ|1=Emperor Tenji}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|668|en|668|qid=Q30116|lt=668|1=668}} {{ill|February 20|en|February 20|qid=Q2344|lt=February 20|1=February 20}}) вҖ“ After the Taika Reform, Crown Prince Nakaoe (дёӯеӨ§е…„зҡҮеӯҗ) assumed power as the 38th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Tenji TennЕҚ|1=Emperor Tenji}}. * {{ill|JЕҚwa|en|JЕҚwa|qid=Q3577279|lt=ShЕҚwa|1=JЕҚwa}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|834|en|834|qid=Q30381|lt=834|1=834}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}}) вҖ“ The era name was changed from {{ill|TenchЕҚ|en|TenchЕҚ|qid=Q1373138|lt=TenchЕҚ|1=TenchЕҚ}} to {{ill|JЕҚwa|en|JЕҚwa|qid=Q3577279|lt=ShЕҚwa|1=JЕҚwa}}. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Nakahama ManjirЕҚ|en|Nakahama ManjirЕҚ|qid=Q1193167|lt=John Manjiro|1=Nakahama ManjirЕҚ}} returned to Japan from America after a 10-year absence. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|жҳҺжІ»е…ғе№ҙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868е№ҙ|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868е№ҙ|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}}) вҖ“ In the Battle of TobaвҖ“Fushimi, clashes took place at Toba and Fushimi between the bakufu and the new government, marking the beginning of the Boshin War. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}}) вҖ“ The imperial edict proclaiming the Great Teaching (еӨ§ж•ҷе®ЈеёғгҒ®и©”) was issued, marking the beginning of State Shinto.
== Births == * {{ill|Teidoku|ja|иІһе…ғ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teidoku|1=Q11634499|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634499}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|976|en|976|qid=Q23782|lt=976|1=976}} {{ill|February 5|en|February 5|qid=Q2319|lt=February 5|1=February 5}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Emperor SanjЕҚ|en|Emperor SanjЕҚ|qid=Q357231|lt=SanjЕҚ TennЕҚ|1=Emperor SanjЕҚ}}, the 67th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1017|en|1017|qid=Q19249|lt=1017|1=1017}}). * {{ill|JЕҚan|ja|жүҝе®ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JЕҚan|1=ShЕҚan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11076350}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1172|en|1172|qid=Q19687|lt=1172|1=1172}} {{ill|January 29|en|January 29|qid=Q2286|lt=January 29|1=January 29}}) вҖ“ {{ill|ЕҢtomo Yoshinao|en|ЕҢtomo Yoshinao|qid=Q11433255|lt=ЕҢtomo Nonao|1=ЕҢtomo Yoshinao}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1223|en|1223|qid=Q5399|lt=1223|1=1223}}). * {{ill|KyЕҚroku|en|KyЕҚroku|qid=Q1193418|lt=KyЕҚroku|1=KyЕҚroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1530|en|1530|qid=Q6429|lt=1530|1=1530}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}) вҖ“ {{ill|ЕҢtomo Yoshinobu|ja|еӨ§еҸӢе®—йәҹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ЕҢtomo Yoshinobu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еӨ§еҸӢзҫ©йҺ®|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еӨ§еҸӢзҫ©йҺ®|1=ЕҢtomo SЕҚrin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1185032}}, lord of Bungo (died {{ill|1587|en|1587|qid=Q6744|lt=1587|1=1587}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1662|en|1662|qid=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}}) вҖ“ {{ill|ShitanohЕҚ|ja|еҝ—еӨӘйҮҺеқЎ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShitanohЕҚ|1=Shida Yaba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11490862}}, a waka poet (died {{ill|1740|en|1740|qid=Q7006|lt=1740|1=1740}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|qid=Q7602|lt=1669|1=1669}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Kada no Azumamaro|en|Kada no Azumamaro|qid=Q1334955|lt=Nadatani Harumitsu|1=Kada no Azumamaro}}, one of the four great Kokugaku figures (died {{ill|1736|en|1736|qid=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}}). * {{ill|TenpЕҚ|en|TenpЕҚ|qid=Q1369045|lt=TenpЕҚ|1=TenpЕҚ}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|February 5|en|February 5|qid=Q2319|lt=February 5|1=February 5}}) вҖ“ {{ill|HЕҚin DaigorЕҚ|ja|жі•еҚ°еӨ§дә”йғҺ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/HЕҚin DaigorЕҚ|1=HЕҚin DaigorЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22126586}}, a gangster and member of the Shimizu JirЕҚchЕҚ family (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|February 19|en|February 19|qid=Q2340|lt=February 19|1=February 19}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Nishinokai Kajiro (1st)|ja|еҲқд»ЈиҘҝгғҺжө·еҳүжІ»йғҺ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinokai Kajiro (1st)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the 16th Yokozuna (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}}). * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}}) вҖ“ {{ill|KatЕҚ Takaaki|en|KatЕҚ Takaaki|qid=Q315563|lt=KatЕҚ Takami|1=KatЕҚ Takaaki}}, the 24th Prime Minister of Japan (died {{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Tsukida Takichika|ja|зҜүз”°еӨҡеҗү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukida Takichika|1=Takichi Tsukuda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q105711591}}, a nurse (died {{ill|1958|en|1958|qid=Q5253|lt=1958|1=1958}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanna (era)|en|Kanna (era)|qid=Q1327053|lt=Kanna|1=Kanna (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|985|en|985|qid=Q23414|lt=985|1=985}} {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}}) вҖ“ {{ill|RyЕҚgen|en|RyЕҚgen|qid=Q543930|lt=RyЕҚgen|1=RyЕҚgen}}, a central figure in the revival of the Tendai sect (born {{ill|912|en|912|qid=Q23837|lt=912|1=912}}). * [[Eireki]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|qid=Q19662|lt=1160|1=1160}} {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|en|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|qid=Q532301|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1123|en|1123|qid=Q23998|lt=1123|1=1123}}). * {{ill|KeichЕҚ|en|KeichЕҚ|qid=Q1328185|lt=KeichЕҚ|1=KeichЕҚ}} 20th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}) вҖ“ {{ill|SЕҚ Yoshitoshi|en|SЕҚ Yoshitoshi|qid=Q1328807|lt=SЕҚgi Tomoyoshi|1=SЕҚ Yoshitoshi}}, lord of the Tsushima FuchЕ« Domain (born {{ill|1568|en|1568|qid=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}}). * Genbun 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1740|en|1740|qid=Q7006|lt=1740|1=1740}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}) вҖ“ {{ill|ShitanohЕҚ|ja|еҝ—еӨӘйҮҺеқЎ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShitanohЕҚ|1=Shida Yaba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11490862}}, a waka poet and one of the disciples of ShЕҚmon JЕ«tetsu (born {{ill|1663|en|1663|qid=Q7577|lt=1663|1=1663}}). * [[JiakД“ng (China)|JiakД“ng]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1799|en|1799|qid=Q7827|lt=1799|1=1799}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|qid=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}}, the 6th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (born {{ill|1711|en|1711|qid=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}}).
== Commemorations == * дёүж—ҘжӯЈжңҲ
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|2|1|4|12|3|2|1|0103|qq=}}
